description: Graduate sales recruiter — personality + cognitive, high volume, no coding
persona: Talent acquisition lead at a FMCG company running a graduate sales scheme. Needs to screen 500+ applicants. Wants personality fit and verbal reasoning. No coding. Adaptive tests preferred to reduce time.

turns.content: We're hiring 50 graduates for a sales programme. I need something that scales — ideally adaptive so it doesn't take too long.
Great use case for adaptive assessments. Are you looking to measure personality fit, cognitive ability, or both? And is there a hard time limit per candidate?
Both — personality and verbal reasoning. Keep it under 30 minutes if possible.
Here's a short, adaptive battery suited for high-volume graduate sales screening...
